segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: There's an old soul in these dogs and they appreciate you in a way that a puppy can't.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: My fill is a senior dog rescue.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: We save senior dogs and find them fabulous new homes.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: We get dogs in all sorts of conditions and because they're old they even have more

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: issues. With matching funds we got from a Subaru grant, we got to set up our own

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: veterinarian team because we don't want to see any dogs suffer once it steps

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: through our doors. I'm not sure that A for rescued me or I rescued her. My oldest

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: granddaughter is now 12 and the younger one is nine. I watched them initially twice a

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: week and I loved that. As they were older and they have their various activities and friends,

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: I don't babysit as much. I miss them already. It's very important for me to have somebody

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: to take care of. It's just my nature. I need to have that. So one night I was looking through

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: all the senior dogs that were available and I saw Eva and I thought, oh my god, this is

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: I said, when I had read her bio, such he had a heart murmur.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: But when Sherry told me that she required a heart surgery,

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: I was pretty taken aback.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: They just really weren't sure that Ava would even

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: make it through the night.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: What Subaru did with CNN Heroes really allowed us

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: to change our game.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: Because we had our own vet, we could

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: see what was going on and save that dog's life.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: If I don't feel needed, then I don't feel loved.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: But Eva needs me.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: I need her, so therefore love exists.
